title: reboulea obtusata var. lobata
intro: Reboulea obtusata var. lobata, also known as Lobed Reboulea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the digestion process. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
